notes: 3.11.56 — SO QUY TAU (Sep bao 2 loi): (1) FIX SO TIEN SAI khi hoan ung: o nhap dong la type=number, go kieu VN '1.708.000' bi browser cat thanh 1.708 → tru quy 1.708d. Doi sang text + parse VN chuan (_unformatNumber) + format nghin — nhu o Nop lai quy. (2) Dong hoan ung trong so quy het khoa cung: nut 👁 xem lai tung khoan (bang net/VAT/tong) + nut ✕ HOAN TAC (xoa AP con theo _batchId + cong lai quy + xoa dong so + audit fund_clear_undo; quyen KT/admin; sua = hoan tac roi nhap lai). Rollback=3.10.41.
